label: namecode - NEBULA | 000 ly
prompt: Cinematic dark monochrome generative art inspired by NGC 6188: Dragons of Ara. Where can you find dragons fighting in the night sky?  In the southern constellation of the Altar: Ara. The dragons are, of course, actually made of suggestively shaped gas and dust.  The celestial Rendered as fine white particles and light filaments on a pure black background, volumetric, dramatic, monochrome white on black, lots of negative space, high detail.
